title: Encapsulation, Properties, and Descriptors · Program Brief: Oop Public Private Conventions
summary: Protect borrower limits, item status, and identifier rules while keeping a small usable public API. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop public private conventions increment in an invariant-protecting circulation model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use public APIs, leading-underscore conventions, and name mangling according to collaboration and subclass risks.
Design immutable value objects with coherent equality, hashing, normalization, and validation semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
